title: Default capture should be avoided
description: Lambdas can use variables from their enclosing scope (called "capture") either by reference or by value. Since lambdas may run asynchronously, reference capture should be used with caution because, by the time the lambda runs, the referenced variable may be out of scope, resulting in an access violation at run time. You can specify default capture by reference ([&]), or by value ([=]).
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.
